commands.repair_reason: - [P2] The remaining code blockers are narrow and mechanical, while maintainer review can separately accept or reject the stateless session semantics.; Needs attention: The diff keeps bearer auth and valid-token Origin rejection, but the new methods should validate browser Origins before auth to preserve the local loopback security boundary.; Review finding: [P1] Import the loopback bearer helper used by the tests —... commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Streamable HTTP GET/SSE and DELETE handling for the gateway MCP loopback endpoint and extends focused gateway tests.

PR surface: Source +53, Tests +72. Total +125 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source: current main only permits POST on `/mcp`, so a GET notification-channel request returns 405 with `Allow: POST`. I did not run the loopback server because this review was read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining code blockers are narrow and mechanical, while maintainer review can separately accept or reject the stateless session semantics.
